dj_text: Moving on from Dragostea Din Tei (Numa Numa) (Medieval Cover) to The Lion Sleeps Tonight (Medieval Cover). You'll survive. Probably. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Hungry? Try Big Ron's Midnight Waffle Emporium — half waffles, half emporium, all heart attack.
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: The Lion Sleeps Tonight (Medieval Cover)
